profile.name: Live Monitoring
profile.description: Faster refresh profile for active crawler watching.

osm_hot.name: OpenStreetMap Humanitarian
osm_hot.attribution: © OpenStreetMap contributors, Tiles style by HOT

library.integrity_note: For production hardening, vendor Leaflet locally under bitcoin/bitnodes/vendor/leaflet/ and update map.js/live-map.js to load local files.

duplicate-location.label: Duplicate IP / Multiple Nodes at Location
duplicate-location.description: Two or more advertised nodes share the same rounded map coordinate.

not-yet-synced.label: Not Yet Synced
not-yet-synced.description: Node reports a block height below the current observed chain tip.

synced-under-10m.label: Synced / Uptime Less Than 10m
synced-under-10m.description: Node appears synced but has less than ten minutes of observed uptime.

synced-10m-plus.label: Synced / Uptime Over 10m
synced-10m-plus.description: Node is synced with more than ten minutes of observed uptime.

stable-48h-plus.label: Synced / Uptime Over 48h
stable-48h-plus.description: Node is synced with more than forty-eight hours of observed uptime.

stable-1w-plus.label: Synced / Uptime Over 1 Week
stable-1w-plus.description: Node is synced with more than one week of observed uptime.

i2p.label: I2P Node
i2p.description: Node is reachable through the I2P overlay network.

tor.label: Tor Node
tor.description: Node is reachable through the Tor onion overlay network.

suspected-vpn.label: Suspected VPN Node
suspected-vpn.description: Node is associated with VPN-like provider, ASN, or heuristic signals.

suspected-proxy.label: Suspected Proxy Node
suspected-proxy.description: Node is associated with proxy-like provider, ASN, or heuristic signals.

became-unreachable.label: Node Became Unreachable
became-unreachable.description: Node was previously known but failed the latest reachability check.

unknown.label: Unknown / Unclassified
unknown.description: Node does not yet have enough telemetry for reliable classification.

public.label: Public / Residential / Civilian
public.description: Ordinary public internet, residential, or civilian node classification.

private.label: Private Company / Commercial Network
private.description: Commercial, enterprise, hosting, or privately operated network.

government.label: Government
government.description: Government-associated organization, ASN, domain, or attribution match.

military.label: Military / Defense
military.description: Military, defense, or armed-forces-associated network attribution.

university.label: University / Academia / Institute
university.description: Academic, research institute, university, or educational network attribution.

datacenter.label: Datacenter / Hosting / Cloud
datacenter.description: Hosting, cloud, VPS, CDN, colocation, or datacenter network.

ngo.label: NGO / Nonprofit / Civic Institution
ngo.description: Nonprofit, civic, foundation, or public-interest institutional network.

layers.label: All Nodes
layers.description: Every geocoded Bitcoin node loaded from the selected source.

layers.label: IPv4 Nodes
layers.description: IPv4 Bitcoin node endpoints.

layers.label: IPv6 Nodes
layers.description: IPv6 Bitcoin node endpoints.

layers.label: Tor Nodes
layers.description: Onion nodes displayed at the symbolic overlay coordinate channel.

layers.label: I2P Nodes
layers.description: I2P nodes displayed at the symbolic overlay coordinate channel.

layers.label: VPN / Suspected VPN
layers.description: Nodes flagged by local VPN heuristics or provider intelligence.

layers.label: Proxy / Suspected Proxy
layers.description: Nodes flagged by local proxy heuristics or proxy intelligence.

layers.label: Datacenter / Hosting
layers.description: Nodes associated with hosting, VPS, cloud, CDN, or datacenter networks.

layers.label: Government
layers.description: Nodes associated with government networks by local attribution rules.

layers.label: Military
layers.description: Nodes associated with military networks by local attribution rules.

layers.label: Sanctioned / Restricted Jurisdiction
layers.description: Nodes flagged by local sanctioned/restricted jurisdiction policy.

layers.label: APT Attribution
layers.description: Nodes with advanced persistent threat attribution flags.

layers.label: Threat Actor Group Attribution
layers.description: Nodes with threat actor group attribution flags.

layers.label: Known Malactor
layers.description: Nodes matched by local known-malactor intelligence.

layers.label: Duplicate Locations
layers.description: Multiple nodes sharing the same rounded map coordinate.

layers.label: Unreachable
layers.description: Nodes that failed the latest reachability check.

layers.label: Not Yet Synced
layers.description: Nodes reporting below-tip block height.

layers.label: Synced
layers.description: Synced nodes without higher uptime classification.

layers.label: Synced 10m+
layers.description: Synced nodes with observed uptime over 10 minutes.

layers.label: Stable 48h+
layers.description: Synced nodes with observed uptime over 48 hours.

layers.label: Clusters
layers.description: Rounded-coordinate aggregate clusters for wide zoom levels.

layers.label: Heatmap
layers.description: Weighted map intensity surface from node concentration and telemetry priority.

layers.label: Unknown
layers.description: Nodes with incomplete or ambiguous telemetry.

overlays.label: Legend
overlays.description: Color and status legend for node markers.

items.label: Duplicate IP / Multiple Nodes at Location
items.description: Two or more advertised nodes share a rounded map coordinate.

items.label: Unreachable
items.description: Node failed the latest reachability check.

items.label: Reachable Now
items.description: Node was reachable in the latest crawl.

items.label: Reachable Within 24H
items.description: Node was seen during the 24-hour rolling window.

items.label: Not Yet Synced
items.description: Node reports a height below the current observed chain tip.

items.label: Synced / Uptime Over 48h
items.description: Synced node with long observed uptime.

items.label: Synced / Uptime Over 10m
items.description: Synced node with short but meaningful uptime.

items.label: Synced
items.description: Synced node without enough uptime metadata for a higher tier.

overlays.label: Telemetry HUD
overlays.description: Live map counters and network category totals.

overlays.label: Network Filter
overlays.description: IPv4, IPv6, Tor, I2P, and unknown network filters.

overlays.label: Status Filter
overlays.description: Sync, uptime, duplicate, and unknown status filters.

overlays.label: Source Badge
overlays.description: Selected crawler source and map build metadata.

overlays.label: Tor Atlantic Channel
overlays.description: Symbolic Atlantic plotting channel for Onion network nodes.

payload.label: Tor Atlantic Channel
payload.note: Overlay-network nodes are intentionally plotted to a symbolic ocean channel because physical attribution is limited.

overlays.label: I2P Indian Ocean Channel
overlays.description: Symbolic Indian Ocean plotting channel for I2P nodes.

payload.label: I2P Indian Ocean Channel
payload.note: Overlay-network nodes are intentionally plotted to a symbolic ocean channel because physical attribution is limited.

overlays.label: Heatmap Overlay
overlays.description: Weighted density overlay for node concentration.

overlays.label: Cluster Overlay
overlays.description: Zoom-level cluster overlays generated from rounded coordinates.

overlays.label: Attribution
overlays.description: Map tile, engine, and project attribution.

parcels.note: Parcel IDs are deterministic synthetic buckets unless official parcel reference data is supplied.

buildings.location_confidence_note: Building footprints are best-effort IP geolocation/rendering approximations. They may indicate a registered address, ISP PoP, datacenter, corporate office, or regional geolocation centroid.

w3w_addresses.note: what3words values may be official API results or local fallback grid values, depending on enrichment source.

zzxgcs_addresses.note: ZZX-GCS values may be official ZZX-GCS list results or deterministic local fallback values.

geohashids.note: GeoHashID values are deterministic local geohash buckets derived from available coordinates.
